sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 103:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 103:1
items.html: The lower seven of Nekudim came out by the coupling of HB on the illumination of Melafum that they received from Yesod of AK, which are ZON.
